mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{newStatus}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE pickup_code = #{pickupCode} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status IN (1, 2) AND deleted = 0

UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{newStatus}, pay_status = 3, refund_time = #{refundTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 6 AND deleted = 0

UPDATE order_info SET order_status = 6, refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refund_apply_time = #{refundApplyTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND user_id = #{userId} AND order_status IN (1, 2) AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE order_status = 6 AND refund_apply_time IS NOT NULL AND refund_apply_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutHours} HOUR) AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{newStatus}, pay_status = 3, refund_time = #{refundTime}, refund_reason = CONCAT(IFNULL(refund_reason, ''), '（系统自动退款：商户超时未处理）'), update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND order_status = 6 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{newStatus}, refund_reason = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 6 AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE order_status = 0 AND expire_time < #{expireTime} AND deleted = 0 AND order_no NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT order_no FROM payment_record WHERE status IN (-1, 0) -- -1:创建中, 0:待支付 AND deleted = 0 ) ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_status = 4, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND order_status = 0 AND deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_record WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status IN (-1, 0) -- -1:创建中, 0:待支付 AND deleted = 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = 3 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM((original_price - sale_price) * quantity), 0) FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = 3 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status IN (1, 2) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = 3 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = 3 AND YEAR(finish_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(finish_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(SUM((original_price - sale_price) * quantity), 0) FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND order_status = 3 AND YEAR(finish_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(finish_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND DATE(finish_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND DATE(finish_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 5 AND DATE(refund_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 -- 已核销/已完成 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 5 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM((original_price - sale_price) * quantity), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status IN (1, 2) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 6 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND DATE(finish_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND DATE(finish_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND YEAR(finish_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(finish_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 3 AND YEAR(finish_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(finish_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND order_status = 5 AND YEAR(refund_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(refund_time) = MONTH(CURDATE()) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM order_info WHERE pay_status = 1 AND deleted = 0

SELECT o.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.phone AS user_phone, u.avatar AS user_avatar, m.merchant_name, m.contact_phone AS merchant_phone, s.store_name, s.detail_address AS store_address FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN user_info u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchant_info m ON o.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN store_info s ON o.store_id = s.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} AND o.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_status = 7, pay_status = 3, refund_time = NOW(), refund_reason = CONCAT(IFNULL(refund_reason, ''), '（平台强制退款：', #{reason}, '）'), update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND order_status IN (2, 3, 6) AND deleted = 0
UPDATE order_info SET order_status = 5, cancel_time = NOW(), cancel_reason = CONCAT('平台强制取消：', #{reason}), update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND order_status = 1 AND deleted = 0
